title: Neural Style Transfer
description: Implemented a Neural Style Transfer model using PyTorch, developing the constructor class to initialize and configure the model architecture for optimal style transfer performance.

title: Rating the Recipe: A Data Story
description: Analyzed 1.1M+ user reviews and 231K+ recipes from Food.com using Python. Performed statistical hypothesis testing and built random forest regression models.

title: Project 2: Persuasive Visualization
description: A group project exploring the ethical boundaries of data visualization. Created opposing visualizations from a single dataset with documented design decisions.
